candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue line at the top of the income statement; matches Total Revenue numerically.
Also a valid revenue line, but appears to be a duplicate/subtotal of Revenues with identical values.
Balance sheet working-capital item, not top-line revenue.
Liability/deferred revenue style item, not reported revenue.

candidates.row_label: Contract Liabilities - Short-Term - Advance Consideration & Progress Billings in Excess of Unbilled Revenue
candidates.why: Deferred/unearned revenue related liability, not income statement top-line.
Deferred revenue liability, not sales recognized in the period.

variables.notes: Use as priority list, not sum. Revenues is preferred; Total Revenue is fallback if label changes.

candidates.row_label: Cost of materials and traffic charges
candidates.why: Best single direct-cost line; clearly represents cost of sales/direct service costs.
Direct service cost component of COGS, but incomplete alone and part of the broader total.
Direct cost component of COGS, but incomplete alone and part of the broader total.

candidates.row_label: Ground leases/Rental Expenses - Cost of Sales
candidates.why: Contains cost-of-sales wording and is direct, but appears within other operating expenses and may be only one component in some years.

candidates.row_label: Costs of materials and traffic charge - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row; explicitly excluded.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of materials and traffic charges

variables.notes: Selected the reported total direct-cost line to avoid undercoverage and double counting from summing its components.

candidates.why: Clear operating overhead/personnel expense component above operating profit.
Broad operating overhead bucket above operating profit; valid since no explicit SG&A row exists.
SG&A-type component, but appears to be included inside Other operating expenses, so selecting both would risk double counting.
R&D line exists but is shown as a supplemental disclosure below EBIT; should not be added to XSGA in this case.
Could be SG&A-related, but no visible values and likely supplemental; weaker than the main overhead rows.
Could indicate personnel overhead, but no visible values and less clearly the primary reported line than Salaries and personnel costs.
Balance sheet asset row, not income statement expense.
Balance sheet accumulated depreciation row, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet asset row, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet accumulated depreciation row, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal is present. Chosen rows are the best overhead buckets above operating profit. Excluded Marketing and sales commission to avoid double counting because it appears to be a component within Other operating expenses. Excluded depreciation/amortization and impairment rows per rules.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line; suitable for XRD even though it appears in supplemental disclosure below EBIT.

variables.notes: Mapped to the dedicated R&D line. It appears below operating profit in the preview, so it is not also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Best single recurring interest-expense line with populated values across years; preferable to broader Financial expenses.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring finance-cost component, but likely included within total Interest Expenses; selecting both would risk double counting.
Recurring finance-cost component, but likely together with lease interest sums to total Interest Expenses; selecting alongside total would double count.
Broader finance-cost line that may include non-interest items; less preferable than direct interest expense.
May include recurring finance costs, but also non-interest items; weaker than direct interest expense.
Semantically relevant but no visible values; weaker than Interest Expenses.
Duplicate-style label with no visible values; weaker fallback than Interest Expenses.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease-interest component, not needed when total Interest Expenses exists.
Capitalized interest offsets expense rather than recurring period finance cost to include directly.
Capitalized interest is not the preferred finance-cost measure.
Balance sheet liability, not expense.
Balance sheet liability, not expense.
Explicitly non-interest-bearing; not interest expense.
Not interest expense.
Not interest expense.
Not finance cost.
Not finance cost.
Equity item, not finance cost.
Equity item, not finance cost.

variables.notes: Selected the direct interest-expense total to avoid double counting versus lease and ex-lease components or broader financial-expense rows.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of Telenor ASA
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line; excludes non-controlling interests and matches book equity definition.
Here it matches the parent-equity amount, but owner-equity-specific label is more precise.
Includes non-controlling interest, so less preferred for BE because MIB is captured separately.
Component/unclear line, not total book equity.
Income statement profit allocation line, not balance sheet equity.
OCI/income item, not equity balance.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of Telenor ASA

variables.notes: Priority list. Preferred line is parent equity excluding NCI. Total Equity is acceptable fallback here because it matches the same values in the preview.

candidates.why: Best balance sheet NCI/minority interest line.
